role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified the absence of text and remained neutral.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Focused on terrain, vegetation density, and climate cues.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Analyzed specific tree species (Betula, Picea) and forest structure.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Analyzed road surface, utility poles, and absence of signage.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Synthesized infrastructure styles and image quality to distinguish regions.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified the ground truth (Russia) by leveraging the meta-agent's analysis of utility pole infrastructure and the landscape/botanics agents' confirmation of the boreal forest biome. The reasoning was consistent and well-supported by the visual evidence.

visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Descriptions of birch/conifer mix and flat terrain match image.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Road and pole descriptions match image.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Pole style and image quality observations are consistent.
